purpose: Structured repository map for AI agents working on ExcelAlchemy.

project.name: ExcelAlchemy
project.summary: Schema-driven Python library for typed Excel import/export workflows built around Pydantic models.

top_level.responsibility: Contract, integration, and unit tests that protect public behavior and internal expectations.
Runnable reference workflows and backend integration examples; treated as user-facing contract.
Human documentation for public API, platform architecture, result objects, limits, performance, onboarding, and release notes.
Authoritative AI agent SSOT for workflow, boundaries, invariants, testing, and review rules.
Archived plans and historical ADRs; useful for design archaeology but not current rules.
Maintenance debt records for known repository-local tradeoffs and follow-up work.
Machine-readable runtime context loaded by the deterministic harness and AI agents, grouped into instructions, architecture, and patterns.
Harness-facing deterministic local tool definitions and adapters.
Harness runtime task-plan templates and active/archive plan artifacts.
Deterministic harness runtime for driving non-deterministic AI agent work.
Local evaluation adapters used by the deterministic harness.
Smoke checks and asset generation helpers.
Example workbooks and generated example outputs used by docs and smoke scripts.

main_modules.responsibility: Main public package surface and common re-export facade.
Public importer/exporter configuration objects and import modes.
Public Excel field metadata entry points and layered field metadata model.
Public result objects, validation result states, and API-friendly error maps.
Public exception types for configuration, cell, row, and programmatic errors.
Public ExcelArtifact wrapper for workbook bytes, base64, and data URL forms.
Public field codec namespace and built-in workbook field semantics.
Main workflow facade implementation for template generation, import, export, and upload.
One-shot import runtime state, lifecycle, counts, and result rendering decisions.
Builds flattened Excel-facing schema layout from Pydantic model declarations.
Parses and validates simple and merged workbook headers.
Aggregates flattened worksheet rows into model-shaped payloads and tracks row/cell issues.
Validates row payloads and dispatches create, update, and upsert callbacks.
High-level rendering for templates, exports, and import result workbooks.
Workbook writing, formatting, comments, colors, and result columns.
ExcelStorage protocol and storage extension boundary.
Storage gateway resolution and missing-storage fallback behavior.
Built-in Minio-compatible ExcelStorage implementation.
WorksheetTable abstraction used for runtime workbook tables instead of pandas.
Pydantic integration boundary for metadata extraction and validation error mapping.
Runtime and workbook display messages with explicit locale policy.
Internal constants, identity wrappers, payload aliases, diagnostics, deprecation helpers, and header models.
Deprecated compatibility namespace retained for the 2.x line.
Deterministic workflow controller and structured agent output schemas.
Serializable run state, step records, retry state, and fix-context aggregation.
Local evaluator for test status, diff size, and unrelated-file checks.
Public entry point for running one harness task.
